mission: Prove the receipt crawler against the real circulation.db ledger, not a synthetic self-test database.
source_truth_rule: GitHub main remains canonical. This packet is carried on a review branch until promoted by a human gate.

input_required.circulation_db: Path to the real SQLite ledger containing table LiveReceipt

pass_condition: A real LiveReceipt row with status SUCCESS and ASSIMILATED false/null is present.
crawler.js writes that receipt to C:\tinkarden\intake\speaker_queue as Markdown.
The same SQLite row remains present and ASSIMILATED is updated to TRUE.
crawler log includes RECEIPT_MOVED for the real DB path.
fail_conditions: LiveReceipt table is missing required status or ASSIMILATED columns
receipt is written without updating the row
self-test output is described as production movement proof
do_not: Do not delete SQLite history rows.
Do not call DB_MISSING a successful receipt move.
Do not promote this crawler as canonical until production movement proof exists.
proof_artifacts_required: speaker queue Markdown file path and SHA256
SQLite readback showing ASSIMILATED TRUE on the same row
